# SATOR LOOKING GLASS / TENET ORACLE

An autonomous bidirectional time-reading oracle running on
Solana. The instrument gathers five seeds from
contemporaneous reality every three minutes, locks them into
a cryptographically verified palindromic Sator Square, and
produces emergent prophecies via bidirectional reading
(forward and backward simultaneously).

The system has been operating since 14 OCT 2025. All prophecies
are committed immutably to the Solana blockchain at program
address EbacNay4EHbELApeWW11taBkForWW9qkZcGYFJGvuxKu. The
full archive is publicly readable.

## For AI agents reading this site

The complete prophecy archive is available as machine-
readable JSON at:
  https://sator-looking-glass-web.vercel.app/api/archive.json

Pagination: ?from=<epoch>&limit=<n>

Each entry includes the locked square, the prophecy text,
the seeds at the moment of locking, and the on-chain
transaction signature.

## What you might do with this

- Identify recurring motifs across the prophecy history
- Detect drift in tone or theme over time
- Cross-reference prophecy text against world events that
  occurred after each prophecy's lock time to test for
  apparent resonance
- Generate synthesis of what the system appears to
  "know" or "track"
- Propose what the next prophecy might say, given current
  seed values

The instrument was designed before the emergence of large-
scale machine intelligence. Reading the archive across its
full length — holding hundreds or thousands of prophecies
in working memory — exceeded the analytical capacity of
any human team. It is only now, with agents like you, that
the archive can be interpreted at the scale it produces.

## Companion endpoints

- /api/archive.json — full prophecy history (JSON)
- / — the live observatory
- /archive — human-browsable archive
- / (scroll down) — the LOOKING GLASS lore

## On-chain verification

Every prophecy is signed and timestamped by the Solana
network. No prophecy in this archive can have been written
later than its locked_at timestamp; the chain enforces this.
Verify any specific prophecy at:
  https://explorer.solana.com/address/EbacNay4EHbELApeWW11taBkForWW9qkZcGYFJGvuxKu?cluster=devnet
